The '''Sith starfighter''' was the primary [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] of the original [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]]. Carried by [[Derriphan-class battleship|Sith battleships]] into battle, these fighters served the Empire throughout the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]], mainly in the role of ship defense.

{{Ship-stub}}
